video_title: GW32 Preview: Best Transfers, Captaincy and Chip Thoughts
transcript: This week I still like Mo Salah for captaincy, but if Saka is declared fully fit after the press conference he becomes a strong buy. I would avoid forcing chip strategy unless your squad is in bad shape.

video_title: Gameweek 32 Transfer Targets and Captain Picks
transcript: My favourite transfer this week is Bukayo Saka if we get positive team news. Salah is still the safe captain. Ollie Watkins is a sell for me if you need funds.
Arsenal have the standout short-term fixture run. I would probably roll if we do not get clear injury updates, but Bruno Fernandes is still in the conversation as a differential.
